testcase.name: test_searchProduct_byKeyword_shouldShowRelevantResults

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. 2026-05-28T11:59:17.985+07:00 INFO 929504 --- [o-auto-8-exec-1] o.a.c.c.C.[Tomcat].[localhost].[/] : Initializing Spring DispatcherServlet 'dispatcherServlet' 2026-05-28T11:59:17.985+07:00 INFO 929504 --- [o-auto-8-exec-1] o.s.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet 'dispatcherServlet' 2026-05-28T11:59:17.985+07:00 INFO 929504 --- [o-auto-8-exec-1] o.s.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 0 ms Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.category, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.stock from products p1_0 Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.category, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.stock from products p1_0 where upper(p1_0.name) like upper(?) escape '\'
